title: Bottled End Cities
description: End Cities but they are remade to be in bottles.
body:
People of the internet!
Have you ever wanted to turn your end cities in to big floating bottles?
Well Now you can!
Just download this simple datapack and try it for your self!
You will see the joys of bottled end citys.



Video of the pack in action:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/sx7eAFgYFo0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
